Effect: One With The Animal.name: 效果：与兽合一 Effect: One With The Animal
Effect: One With The Animal.description:
你变成与你的本能相关联类型的一种动物，持续 1 分钟。你在此形态下无法说话，也无法进行带有语言（特征）的动作，并且你的道具会被吸收到你体内；你的道具的恒定能力仍可运作，而你不能启动任何物品。你在此形态下获得动物（特征）、微光视觉，以及一种射程为 30 尺的模糊感官嗅觉。你会保持此形态直到你解消效果。你可以在此形态下 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Ah5g9pDwWF9b9VW9]{狂暴}，若你这么做，则该效果结束，并在狂暴时恢复为你的正常形态。你获得你在狂暴时被授予的徒手攻击，但你将其伤害骰降低 2 个阶梯。若你的徒手攻击的伤害骰为 d6 或更低，则你在此形态下不会获得该徒手攻击。只要你处于此形态，你就获得下列列出的数据。

蚂蚁、螳螂、蝎子、蜘蛛你的体型为超小型，拥有以射程 30 尺的模糊感官表现的震动感知，并获得 30 尺的攀爬速度。

猿、熊、猫、蛇你的体型为中型，获得 30 尺的攀爬速度，且你的嗅觉为精确感官而非模糊感官。

甲龙、雷龙、象、霸王龙你的体型为大型，拥有 10 尺触及，并且笨拙 1。

蝙蝠、鸟、黄蜂你获得 30 尺的飞行速度。

野猪、公牛、鹿、独角兽你的速度获得 +20 尺状态加值。

螃蟹、青蛙、虎鲸、海豹、鲨鱼你获得 30 尺的游泳速度，并且可以在水下呼吸。

鳄鱼、海龟你获得 30 尺的游泳速度，以及 AC 的 +1 状态加值。

伶盗龙、狼你的速度获得 +10 尺状态加值，且你的嗅觉为精确感官而非模糊感官。

You change into an animal of the type associated with your instinct for 1 minute. You cannot speak or take actions with the linguistic trait while in this form and your gear is absorbed into you; the constant abilities of your gear still function, and you can't activate any items. You gain the animal trait, low-light vision, and an imprecise scent with a range of 30 feet while in this form. You remain in this form until you Dismiss the effect. You can @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Ah5g9pDwWF9b9VW9]{Rage} while in this form, and if you do you the effect ends and assume your normal form while raging. You gain the unarmed attacks granted to you while raging, but you reduce the damage die by 2 steps. If your unarmed attack’s damage die is d6 or lower, you do not gain that unarmed attack while in this form. You gain the listed statistics as long as you are in this form.

Ant, Mantis, Scorpion, Spider You are Tiny in size, have tremorsense as an imprecise sense with a range of 30 feet, and a climb Speed of 30 feet.

Ape, Bear, Cat, Snake You are Medium in size, have a climb Speed of 30 feet and your scent is a precise sense instead of an imprecise sense.

Akylosaurus, Brontosaurus, Elephant, Tyrannosaurus You are Large in size, have 10 feet of reach, and are clumsy 1.

Bat, Bird, Wasp You gain a fly Speed of 30 feet.

Boar, Bull, Deer, Unicorn You gain a +20-foot status bonus to your Speed.

Crab, Frog, Orca, Seal, Shark You gain a swim Speed of 30 feet and can breath underwater.

Crocodile, Turtle You gain a swim Speed of 30 feet and a +1 status bonus to AC.

Velociraptor, Wolf You gain a +10-foot status bonus to your Speed and your scent is a precise sense instead of an imprecise sense.

Effect: Bolstered by the Ancestor.name: 效果：受祖灵鼓舞 Effect: Bolstered by the Ancestor
Effect: Bolstered by the Ancestor.description:
来自 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.items.MuCPsDYkSMcI5Ukh]{先祖的支援}。

如果你在所选技能上为传奇，你改为在狂暴时对所选技能获得+2状态加值。

From @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.items.MuCPsDYkSMcI5Ukh]{Bolstered by the Ancestor}.

If you are legendary in the chosen skill, you instead gain a +2 status bonus to the chosen skill while raging.

Effect: Protective Runes.name: 效果：防护符文 Effect: Protective Runes
Effect: Protective Runes.description:
当你被可怕的重击击中时，你的符文会迅速飞向撞击点。作为反应动作（），当你在狂暴时，你可以让自己对一次以你为目标的攻击获得AC+2环境加值。你必须在得知该次攻击的结果之前声明你正在使用你的反应动作（）。

Your runes dart to the point of impact when you are struck by terrible blows. As a reaction, you can give yourself a +2 circumstance bonus to AC against a single Strike that targets you while raging. You must declare you are using your reaction before you know the result of the Strike.

Effect: Walk With Spirits.name: 效果：与灵同行 Effect: Walk With Spirits
Effect: Walk With Spirits.description:
你化为一个狂暴的灵体。你变为虚体，并获得等于你速度一半的飞行速度。当你选择将你的伤害改为灵魂伤害时，对有形生物的打击会如常影响有形生物，且你的狂暴抗力变为对所有伤害（除了力场）具有抗力。直到你的狂暴结束前，这些效果持续存在。

You become a raging spirit. You become incorporeal and gain a fly Speed equal to half your Speed. Strikes against corporeal creatures when you choose to change your damage to spirit damage affect corporeal creatures as normal and your raging resistance changes to be resistance to all damage (except force). These effects last until your rage ends.

Effect: Furious Concoction.name: 效果：狂怒调合物 Effect: Furious Concoction
Effect: Furious Concoction.description:
你创造出一份持续1分钟的狂怒混合剂。狂怒混合剂的效果与缺陷由随机决定：先掷一次[[/r d20]]以决定效果，然后再掷一次d20以决定缺陷。需要进行豁免的效果使用你的职业DC。

d20

效果

缺陷

1

灾厄酿剂 为第二个缺陷掷骰。忽略任何结果包含1或20的掷骰。

可怕的缺陷 掷骰两次并承受2个缺陷。忽略任何结果包含1的掷骰。

2-4

巨量生长 你变为巨型，触及增加10尺（若你原本为大型或更小），且你的装备随你一起增大体型。你在持续时间内为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1}。

爆炸 你爆炸，对5尺放射范围内的所有生物（包括你自己）造成@Damage[10d6[fire]]伤害，进行一次@Check[basic:true|type:reflex|against:classDC]豁免。

5-7

怪异之翼 你获得45尺飞行速度。

麻木大脑 你在持续时间内为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 2}。

8-10

额外肢体 获得一对额外的手臂来帮助你攻击。你所有攻击的多重攻击减值在第二次攻击时为-3（若为灵巧则为-2），第三次或后续攻击时为-6（若为灵巧则为-4）。

陌生的解剖结构 当你以带有操作（特征）的行动时，你必须尝试一次DC 5纯骰检定，否则该行动失去。

11-13

诡异之眼 你获得一个@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.uqlxMQQeSGWEVjki]{真知术}法术的效果，其环阶等于你等级的一半，且其反制调整值等于你的职业DC - 10。

你为什么要喝那个？！ 在你停止狂暴前，你受到@Damage[2d8[persistent,poison]]伤害。

14-16

钢铁之肤 你获得对所有物理伤害的抗力，数值等于你的狂暴抗力。

细胞紊乱 你从带有治疗（特征）的法术或物品中恢复的生命值减半，持续1小时。

17-19

吐息武器 你获得一种吐息武器，作为一个2行动行动，在一个@Template[distance:20|type:cone]中造成@Damage[15d6]伤害，进行一次@Check[basic:true|type:reflex|against:classDC]豁免。伤害类型为寒冷或火焰伤害，在你使用狂怒混合剂时随机决定。在你使用吐息武器后，你在[[/r 1d4]]轮内不能再次使用它。

残破之躯 在此效果期间你第一次被重击时，你失去部分敏捷，AC承受–1减值，且所有你的速度承受–10尺状态减值。

20

奇迹酿剂 掷骰两次并获得2个效果。忽略任何结果包含1或20的掷骰。

令人惊讶的益处 为第二个效果掷骰。忽略任何结果包含1或20的掷骰。

You create a furious concoction that lasts for 1 minute. The effects and drawbacks of a furious concoction are randomly determined by rolling a [[/r d20]] to determine the effect and then another d20 to determine the drawback. An effect that requires a saving throw uses your class DC.

d20

Effect

Drawback

1

Disastrous Brew Roll for a second drawback. Ignore any rolls that include 1 or 20.

Terrible Drawbacks Roll twice and take 2 drawbacks. Ignore any rolls that include 1.

2-4

Massive Growth You become Huge, increasing your reach by 10 feet (if you were Large or smaller) and your equipment grows in size with you. You are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} for the duration.

Explode You explode dealing @Damage[10d6[fire]] damage with a @Check[basic:true|type:reflex|against:classDC] save in a 5-foot emanation, including yourself.

5-7

Monstrous Wings You gain a fly Speed of 45 feet.

Numbed Brain You are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} for the duration.

8-10

Extra Limbs Gain an extra set of arms that help you attack. Your multiple attack penalty on all attacks is -3 or (-2 if agile) on your second attack, or -6 (-4 if agile) on your third or subsequent attacks.

Unfamiliar Anatomy When you take an action with the manipulate trait, you must attempt a DC 5 flat check or the action is lost.

11-13

Bizarre Eyes You gain the effects of a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.uqlxMQQeSGWEVjki]{Truesight} spell of a rank equal to half your level with a counteract modifier equal to your class DC - 10.

Why Did You Drink That?! You take @Damage[2d8[persistent,poison]] damage until you stop raging.

14-16

Steel Skin You gain resistance to all physical damage equal to your raging resistance.

Scrambled Cells You restore half as many Hit Points from spells or items with the healing trait for 1 hour.

17-19

Breath Weapon You gain a breath weapon that deals @Damage[15d6] damage with a @Check[basic:true|type:reflex|against:classDC] save in a @Template[distance:20|type:cone] as a 2-action activity. The damage is either cold or fire damage, determined at random when you use Furious Concoction. After you use your breath weapon you cannot use it again for [[/r 1d4]] rounds.

Broken Body The first time you are critically hit during this effect, you lose some of your agility and take a –1 penalty to AC and a –10-foot status penalty to all your Speeds.

20

Miraculous Brew Roll twice and take 2 effects. Ignore any rolls that include 1 or 20.

Surprising Benefits Roll for a second effect. Ignore any rolls that include 1 or 20.

Effect: Call the Ethereal Breach.name: 效果：召唤以太裂隙 Effect: Call the Ethereal Breach
Effect: Call the Ethereal Breach.description:
以太之物的短暂本质扎下根基。范围发散内的生物获得10英尺飞行速度、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1}，以及等同于你等级的物理伤害抗力，除非该伤害将由具有@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.JQdwHECogcTzdd8R]{幽灵接触}属性的武器或徒手攻击造成。

The ephemeral natures of the ethereal take root. Creatures within the emanation gain a fly speed of 10 feet, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1}, and resistance to physical damage equal to your level unless the damage would be dealt by a weapon or unarmed attack with the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.JQdwHECogcTzdd8R]{Ghost Touch} property.

Bolster Hope.name: 鼓舞希望 Bolster Hope
Bolster Hope.description:
触发 一名敌人以一次打击将一名盟友作为目标，且你们双方都在你15尺范围内。

需求 你未处于负重状态，且未穿着重型护甲。

你在痛苦与毁灭面前鼓舞你的盟友。尝试进行一次 @Check[type:diplomacy|defense:will]{交涉} 检定，对抗该触发敌人的意志DC。

大成功或大失败 该触发敌人对触发盟友的打击承受–2环境减值，且你的盟友获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.misc.Item.xVAGPe1NX6QEwQ7O]{振奋}。

成功 同大成功或大失败，但环境减值为–1。

特殊 若你拥有 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.88Q33X2a0iYPkbzd]{强劲狂暴} 职业特性，则在一次遭遇中，你第一次对一名曾对你的某位盟友造成伤害的敌人进行打击时，你造成等同于你的狂暴伤害的额外伤害。

Trigger An enemy targets an ally with a Strike and both are within 15 feet of you.

Requirements You are not encumbered or wearing heavy armor.

You encourage your ally in the face of pain and devastation. Attempt a @Check[type:diplomacy|defense:will]{Diplomacy} check against the Will DC of the triggering enemy.

Critical Success The triggering enemy takes a –2 circumstance penalty to its Strike against the triggering ally and your ally is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.misc.Item.xVAGPe1NX6QEwQ7O]{invigorated}.

Success As critical success, except the circumstance penalty is –1.

Special If you have the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.88Q33X2a0iYPkbzd]{Mighty Rage} class feature, the first time you make a Strike in an encounter against an enemy that dealt damage to one of your allies, you deal additional damage equal to your Rage damage.

Effect: Shattered Response.name: 效果：破碎回应 Effect: Shattered Response
Effect: Shattered Response.description:
你的打击会造成额外伤害，数值等于该盾牌被摧毁时给予你的AC加值。如果你拥有高等武器专精，此额外伤害加倍。

Your Strike deals additional damage equal to the AC Bonus the shield was granting you at the time it was destroyed. If you have greater weapon specialization, this additional damage is doubled.

Effect: Furious Anatomy.name: 效果：狂怒解剖 Effect: Furious Anatomy

Protective Runes.name: 防护符文 Protective Runes
Protective Runes.description:
当你遭受可怕的重击时，你的符文会迅速飞向冲击点。作为反应动作（），你可以在狂暴期间，对一次以你为目标的单次打击使自己获得AC+2环境加值。你必须在知道该次打击结果之前声明你正在使用你的反应动作（）。

Your runes dart to the point of impact when you are struck by terrible blows. As a reaction, you can give yourself a +2 circumstance bonus to AC against a single Strike that targets you while raging. You must declare you are using your reaction before you know the result of the Strike.

Effect: Call of the Ancestor.name: 效果：祖灵的召唤 Effect: Call of the Ancestor

Effect: Destined Kill Fulfilled.name: 效果：命定之杀已实现 Effect: Destined Kill Fulfilled
Effect: Destined Kill Fulfilled.description:
如果你将你命中注定要杀死的目标降至 0 生命值，你的姿态立即结束，并且你获得等同于你等级的临时生命值，持续至你狂暴结束为止。如果该生物高于你的等级，你还会在狂暴结束前获得对意志豁免的 +2 状态加值。

If you reduce your destined kill to 0 Hit Points your stance immediately ends and you gain temporary Hit Points equal to your level that last for as long as you are raging. If the creature was above your level, you also gain a +2 status bonus to Will saves until your rage ends.

Wildblood Spellcasting.name: 狂野血脉施法 Wildblood Spellcasting
Wildblood Spellcasting.description:
你获得施法（行动）的许可，但对你而言，除非你从其他来源获得施法（行动）的许可（例如多职业奉献专长），否则它带有狂暴（特征）。你从此职业变体及其专长获得的法术获得狂暴（特征）。你在你根源的法术的法术攻击掷骰与法术DC上为受训。到第9等级，你的法术攻击调整与法术DC的熟练度等级提升至专家；到第17等级，你的法术攻击调整与法术DC的熟练度等级提升至大师。你的狂暴法术的关键施法能力为魅力。为了学习新法术，你将你的血脉法术视为你根源的法术。你不会从你所选择的血脉中获得任何其他能力。

每天，你可以施放一个1环法术和三个戏法。你必须已知晓法术才能施放它们，并通过法术储备职业特性学习它们。你每天能施放的法术数量称为你的法术储备。随着你作为野蛮人等级的提升，你血脉中的魔法会赐予你额外且更强大的法术位。你的法术位总数以及你能施放的最高环法术在下表中列出。由于你的血狂暴期间会释放大量魔法能量，你的最高环法术位不超过两个；并且若你能施放2环或更高环法术，则你还拥有两个比你最高法术环低1环的法术位。你仍然可以通过此变体授予的专长获得额外法术位。

你可以花费1分钟进入专注状态，使你即使未处于狂暴中也能使用施法（行动）来施放一个带有狂暴（特征）的法术。此心境持续到你施放（行动）、狂暴，或因任何原因陷入无力状态之后（以先发生者为准）。

你的等级戏法1环2环3环4环5环6环7环8环9环10环

252---------

You gain access to the Cast a Spell activity, but for you it has the rage trait unless you gain access to the Cast a Spell activity from another source (such as a multiclass dedication feat). Spells you gain from this class archetype and its feats gain the rage trait. You're trained in spell attack rolls and spell DCs for your tradition's spells. At 9th level, your proficiency ranks for spell attack modifier and spell DC increase to expert, and at 17th level your proficiency ranks for spell attack modifier and spell DC increase to master. Your key spellcasting ability for your rage spells is Charisma. You treat your bloodline spells as if they were spells of your tradition for the purpose of learning new spells. You don't gain any other abilities from your choice of bloodline.

Each day, you can cast one 1st-rank spell and three cantrips. You must know spells to cast them, and you learn them via the spell repertoire class feature. The number of spells you can cast each day is called your spell repertoire. As you increase in level as a barbarian, the magic in your veins grants you additional, more powerful spell slots. Your total number of spell slots and the highest rank of spells you can cast are shown in the table below. Because of how much magic energy is expelled during your bloodrages, you have no more than two spell slots of your highest rank and, if you can cast 2nd-rank spells or higher, two spell slots of 1 rank lower than your highest spell rank. You can still gain additional spell slots via feats granted by this archetype.

You can spend 1 minute to enter a state of focus that allows you to use the Cast a Spell activity to cast one of your spells with the rage trait even though you are not raging. This state of mind lasts until after you Cast a Spell, Rage, or are incapacitated for any reason whichever comes first.

Your LevelCantrips1st2nd3rd4th5th6th7th8th9th10th

Stance: Destined Kill.name: 架势：命定杀戮 Stance: Destined Kill
Stance: Destined Kill.description:
你对所选敌人的攻击掷骰获得+1环境加值，并对其处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{着迷}状态。你对除目标以外的生物进行攻击掷骰时承受–1环境减值。若你对你命定之杀的目标以外的生物采取敌对动作，你立即结束你的架势，除非这些动作是与目标交战所必需的，例如尝试摆脱受擒状态（由GM酌情决定）。

如果你将你的命定之杀降至0生命值，你的架势立即结束，你获得等同于你等级的临时生命值，并持续到你不再狂暴为止。如果该生物的等级高于你的等级，你还会在狂暴结束前获得+2状态加值于意志豁免。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.misc.Item.NmoeGOyv73LeJbjr]{效果：命定之杀达成}

You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to attack rolls against the chosen enemy and become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{fascinated} by them. You take a –1 circumstance penalty to attack rolls against creatures other than the target. You immediately end your stance if you take hostile actions against creatures other than the target of your destined kill, unless they would be required to engage with your target, such as attempting to Escape from the grabbed condition (subject to GM discretion).

If you reduce your destined kill to 0 Hit Points your stance immediately ends and you gain temporary Hit Points equal to your level that last for as long as you are raging. If the creature was above your level, you also gain a +2 status bonus to Will saves until your rage ends.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.misc.Item.NmoeGOyv73LeJbjr]{Effect: Destined Kill Fulfilled}

Effect: Wildblood Infusion.name: 效果：野血灌注 Effect: Wildblood Infusion
Effect: Wildblood Infusion.description:
如果你施放法术，你的近战打击在你下个回合结束前造成额外的狂暴伤害，并且如果该法术造成了伤害，你的额外伤害的伤害类型变为与该法术的伤害相同。如果该法术造成多种伤害类型，当该法术的伤害结算时，你选择你的打击获得哪一种伤害类型。

If you Cast a Spell, your melee Strikes deal your additional rage damage until the end of your next turn and the damage type of your additional damage changes to be the same as the damage of the spell if the spell dealt damage. If the spell deals more than one type of damage, you choose which damage type your Strikes gain when the spell’s damage is resolved.

Furious Cacophony.name: 狂怒喧嚣 Furious Cacophony
Furious Cacophony.description:
需求 你未处于负重状态，且未穿着重型护甲。

你吟唱或演奏出强大到足以撼动对手灵魂深处的音乐。所有位于 @Template[type:cone|distance:15] 内的生物必须针对你的表演 DC 进行一次 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:performance] 豁免检定；你释放出猛烈的声波爆破，根据结果造成 @Damage[max(1, @actor.level - 3)d6[sonic]] 伤害。如果你处于遭遇的第一轮，你可以将狂暴作为此行动的一部分进行，并且它获得绝技（特征）。在第3等级，以及此后每个等级，你的喧响伤害增加 1d6。

大成功 你造成双倍伤害，且该生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{耳聋} 与 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及} 1轮。

成功 你造成全额伤害，且该生物耳聋 1轮。

失败 你造成一半伤害。

大失败 该生物不受影响。

特殊 若你拥有 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.88Q33X2a0iYPkbzd]{强力狂暴} 职业特性，当你使用狂怒喧响时，你可以选择创造一个 @Template[type:cone|distance:30] 而非 15 尺锥形范围。

Requirements You’re not encumbered or wearing heavy armor.

You sing or play music so mighty that it rocks opponents to their very core. All creatures in a @Template[type:cone|distance:15] must attempt a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:performance] save against your Performance DC as you unleash a violent blast of sound dealing @Damage[max(1, @actor.level - 3)d6[sonic]] damage depending on the result. If you are in the first round of an encounter, you can Rage as part of this activity and it gains the flourish trait. At 3rd level, and every level thereafter, increase your cacophony’s damage by 1d6.

Critical Success You deal double damage and the creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{deafened} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{off-guard} for 1 round.

Success You deal full damage and the creature is deafened for 1 round.

Failure You deal half damage.

Critical Failure The creature is unaffected.

Special If you have the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.88Q33X2a0iYPkbzd]{Mighty Rage} class feature, when you use Furious Cacophony, you can choose to create a @Template[type:cone|distance:30] instead of a 15-foot cone.

Cold Judgement.name: 冷酷审判 Cold Judgement
Cold Judgement.description:
你冷酷地以无情审判你的敌人，因为无情即是对你自己的仁慈。如果这是一次遭遇的第一轮，且你未处于负荷状态，也未穿着重型护甲，你可以将冷酷审判作为自由动作（）使用。掷骰一次察觉检定以 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{搜索（Seek）}，并将其与当前遭遇中一个你并未对其处于未察觉状态的敌人的 [[/act seek dc=deception]]{欺瞒 DC}、[[/act seek dc=stealth]]{潜行 DC}，或其等级的标准 DC（取其中较高者）进行比较。除你搜索（Seek）的正常结果外，你的搜索（Seek）还会获得以下效果。

大成功或大失败 GM 从以下关于该敌人的信息中选择两条告诉你：该敌人最高的弱点是哪一种、该敌人哪一种豁免的调整值最低、该敌人拥有的一项免疫、或该敌人最高的抗力是哪一种。若出现并列，GM 应随机选择其一。在你获得这些信息后，该敌人在 1 小时内免疫你的冷酷审判。

成功 同大成功或大失败，但 GM 只从上述列表中选择一条信息告诉你。

特殊 若你拥有 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.88Q33X2a0iYPkbzd]{强力狂暴（Mighty Rage）}职业特性，当你将冷酷审判作为自由动作（）使用时，你在自己第一回合中进行的第一次打击（Strike）造成等同于你狂暴伤害的额外伤害。

You coldly judge your enemy in your ruthlessness, for ruthlessness is mercy upon yourself. You can use Cold Judgment as a free action if it is the first round of an encounter and you are not encumbered or wearing heavy armor. Roll a Perception check to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek} and compare it against the [[/act seek dc=deception]]{Deception DC}, [[/act seek dc=stealth]]{Stealth DC}, or a standard DC of its level (whichever is higher) of an enemy that is not undetected by you in the current encounter. Your Seek gains the following effects in addition to the normal results of your Seek.

Critical Success The GM chooses two of the following pieces of information about the enemy to tell you: which of the enemy’s weaknesses is highest, which of the enemy’s saving throws has the lowest modifier, one immunity the enemy has, or which of the enemy’s resistances is highest. In the event of a tie, the GM should pick one at random. After you gain this information, that enemy is immune to your Cold Judgment for 1 hour.

Success As critical success, but the GM chooses one piece of information from the above list to tell you about the enemy.

Special If you have the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.88Q33X2a0iYPkbzd]{Mighty Rage} class feature, when you use Cold Judgment as a free action, the first Strike you make during your first turn deals additional damage equal to your Rage damage.

Breach Blow.name: 破防重击 Breach Blow
Breach Blow.description:
你的打击强大到足以撼动现实的织构，并唤出你所在位面的残余。你进行一次近战打击，并在一个必须包含你此次打击之目标的 @Template[distance:10|type:cone] 内制造虚幻的困难地形；在这次打击中，你对其获得来自你的狂暴的任何伤害加值。该困难地形持续到你下个回合结束。一名生物在使用一次[[/act seek]]动作后，或以其他方式花费动作与幻象互动，并进行一次察觉检定对抗你的职业DC后，可以如常尝试识破该效果。若其成功识破，则在剩余持续时间内无视该效果，但之后每次使用“破界重击”都必须分别进行识破。

Your blow is so powerful it shakes the fabric of reality and brings forth remnants of your plane. You make a melee Strike and create illusory difficult terrain in a @Template[distance:10|type:cone] that must include the target of your Strike, gaining any bonuses to damage from your rage against them for this Strike. This difficult terrain lasts until the end of your next turn. A creature can attempt to disbelieve the effect as normal after using a [[/act seek]] action or otherwise spending actions interacting with the illusion and making a Perception check against your class DC. If it successfully disbelieves, it ignores the effect for the remaining duration but subsequent uses of Breach Blow must be disbelieved separately.

Effect: Body Bludgeon.name: 效果：肉身重击 Effect: Body Bludgeon
Effect: Body Bludgeon.description:
来自 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.items.NuVhLGH5kPGQLtMo]{躯体钝器}

你获得一次徒手打击，其数据取决于被你擒抱或束缚的生物的体型。

From @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.items.NuVhLGH5kPGQLtMo]{Body Bludgeon}

You gain an unarmed strike with statistics dependent on the grabbed or restrained creature's size.

Effect: Invigorating Speech.name: 效果：振奋人心的演讲 Effect: Invigorating Speech
Effect: Invigorating Speech.description:
如果该生物在接下来1小时内进入一场与你的演讲相关的遭遇，则它在大成功或大失败时获得15点临时生命值，或在成功时获得10点临时生命值，并且对抗死亡与恐惧效果的豁免获得+2状态加值，持续1分钟。

If the creature enters an encounter in the next hour related to your speech, it gains 15 temporary Hit Points on a critical success or 10 temporary Hit Points on a success, and a +2 status bonus to saves against death and fear effects that last for 1 minute.

Effect: Stand Firm.name: 效果：坚定不移 Effect: Stand Firm
Effect: Stand Firm.description:
你使你的近战攻击的触及增加5尺，并获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{禁足（状态）}，直到你下个回合开始。就那些试图在你处于禁足（状态）时移动你的效果而言，你以你的强韧DC作为禁足（状态）的DC。

You increase the reach of your melee attacks by 5 feet and become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{immobilized} until the beginning of your next turn. For the purposes of effects that attempt to move you while you’re immobilized, you use your Fortitude DC for the DC of the immobilized condition.

Spell Repertoire (Wildblood).name: 法术库（狂血） Spell Repertoire (Wildblood)
Spell Repertoire (Wildblood).description:
你能够施放的法术集合称为你的法术剧目。在1级时，你学会两个你选择的1环法术和三个戏法，其中两个可自由选择，另一个由你的血脉决定。你从与你血脉相对应的根源的常见法术、你血脉的巫术赋礼法术，或该根源中你拥有许可的其他法术中进行选择。如果你从血脉获得的法术可以被维持，则该法术的维持动作获得狂暴（特征）。你可以通过使用一个适当法术环位的法术位来施放你法术剧目中的任何法术。你的法术位与法术剧目中的法术是分开的。如果某个专长或其他能力将一个法术加入你的法术剧目，它不会给予你额外的法术位，反之亦然。

随着你等级提升，你会将更多法术加入该法术剧目。每当你获得一个法术位时，你就将一个同环位的法术加入你的法术剧目。在2级时，你再选择一个1环法术。在3级时，你将第一个2环法术加入你的剧目。在4级时，你获得第二个2环法术，你的法术剧目达到其最大体量，为五个法术。

The collection of spells you can cast is called your spell repertoire. At 1st level, you learn two 1st-rank spells of your choice and three cantrips, two which you can choose freely and one determined by your bloodline. You choose these from the common spells from the tradition corresponding to your bloodline, the sorcerous gift spells of your bloodline, or from other spells from that tradition to which you have access. If a spell you gained from your bloodline can be Sustained, the Sustain action gains the rage trait for that spell. You can cast any spell in your spell repertoire by using a spell slot of an appropriate spell rank. Your spell slots and the spells in your spell repertoire are separate. If a feat or other ability adds a spell to your spell repertoire, it doesn't give you another spell slot, and vice versa.

You add to this spell repertoire as you increase in level. Each time you get a spell slot, you add a spell of the same rank to your spell repertoire. At 2nd level, you select another 1st-rank spell. At 3rd level, you add the first 2nd-rank spell to your repertoire. At 4th level you gain your second and your spell repertoire reaches its maximum size of five spells.

War Rune Pocket.name: 战斗符文口袋 War Rune Pocket
War Rune Pocket.description:
你的符文扭曲变形为武器，你可以让它们从虚无中出现在你手中。选择一把你熟练的简易、军用或高级武器。

你可以交互以将所选武器存放在你的某个纹身中并将其取回。

你可以交互从你的纹身中抽出这把武器，然后以单动作使用它进行打击。

Your runes warp and change into weapons, which you can have appear in your hands from nowhere. Choose a simple, martial, or advanced weapon you are proficient in.

You can Interact to store and retrieve the chosen weapon in one of your tattoos.

You can Interact to draw this weapon from your tattoo, and then Strike with it as a single action.

Furious Anatomy.name: 狂怒解剖学 Furious Anatomy
Furious Anatomy.description:
触发 一个相邻的敌人对你造成伤害。

你不同寻常的解剖结构会以同样方式回应该生物。触发的敌人必须尝试进行一次对抗你的职业DC的 @Check[type:will|basic:true|against:classDC] 豁免，否则受到 @Damage[(floor(@actor.level/2) + @actor.system.abilities.con.mod)[@actor.flags.pf2e.fleshInstinct.damageType]] 伤害，数值等于你等级的一半加上你的体质调整值。豁免失败的生物还会承受你血肉显现所列出的效果；豁免大失败的生物还会受到 @Damage[(1 + floor((@actor.level + 1) / 3))[persistent,@actor.flags.pf2e.fleshInstinct.bleedDamage]] 伤害。该持续伤害在4级时增加1点，并在之后每3个等级再增加1点。伤害类型由你的血肉显现决定，并且该反应动作（）获得所列出的特征。若你的狂怒解剖结构的伤害类型为物理伤害，则持续伤害为流血伤害。所列出的效果持续至你下个回合结束。

翻涌孔口 该生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 1}。

胡言乱语之口 该生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{耳聋}。

触手丝缕 该生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1}。

长舌喙突 该生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱 1}。

不眨之眼 该生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩}。

扭曲痉挛 该生物因你而处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{迷魂（状态）}；你对该生物采取的敌对动作不会结束此迷魂（状态），但你的盟友对其采取的敌对动作仍会结束该迷魂（状态）。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.misc.FkF29ynszmKcnWYX]{效果：狂怒解剖结构}

Trigger An adjacent enemy damages you.

Your unusual anatomy responds to the creature in kind. The triggering enemy must attempt a @Check[type:will|basic:true|against:classDC] save against your class DC or take @Damage[(floor(@actor.level/2) + @actor.system.abilities.con.mod)[@actor.flags.pf2e.fleshInstinct.damageType]] damage equal to half your level plus your Constitution modifier. Creatures that fail their save also suffer the listed effect for your flesh manifestation and creatures that critically fail their save take @Damage[(1 + floor((@actor.level + 1) / 3))[persistent,@actor.flags.pf2e.fleshInstinct.bleedDamage]] damage. This persistent damage increases by 1 at 4th level and every 3 levels thereafter. The damage type is determined by your flesh manifestation and this reaction gains the listed traits. If the damage type of your Furious Anatomy is physical damage, the persistent damage is bleed damage. The listed effect lasts until the end of your next turn.

Billowing Orifice The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1}.

Gibbering Mouth The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{Deafened}.

Tentacle Strands The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1}.

Tongue Proboscis The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1}.

Unblinking Eyes The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled}.

Warp Spasm The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated} by you and hostile actions you take against the creature, but not your allies, do not end this fascinated condition.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.misc.FkF29ynszmKcnWYX]{Effect: Furious Anatomy}

Welcome Misery.name: 欢迎苦难 Welcome Misery
Welcome Misery.description:
你拥抱自身的痛苦，将其作为振奋的手段。若这是遭遇的第一轮，且你未处于负载或穿着重型护甲，你可以将“欢迎苦痛”作为自由动作（）使用。你受到等同于@Damage[max(1,@actor.level/2)]{你等级的一半}（最低 1）的伤害。此伤害无法以任何方式减免或避免。直到你下个回合开始，你对抗听觉效果的状态加值加倍，且你忽略由惊惧（状态）导致的、对你攻击掷骰的状态减值。

特殊 若你拥有@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.88Q33X2a0iYPkbzd]{强力狂暴}职业特性，当你将“欢迎苦痛”作为自由动作（）使用时，你在自己第一回合内进行的第一次打击会造成等同于你狂暴伤害的额外伤害。

You embrace your own misery, adopting the pain as a means to bolster. You can use Welcome Misery as a free action if it is the first round of an encounter and you are not encumbered or wearing heavy armor. You take damage equal to @Damage[max(1,@actor.level/2)]{half your level} (minimum 1). This damage can’t be reduced or avoided by any means. Until the beginning of your next turn, you double your status bonus against auditory effects and you ignore status penalties to your attack rolls from the frightened condition.

Special If you have the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.88Q33X2a0iYPkbzd]{Mighty Rage} class feature, when you use Welcome Misery as a free action, the first Strike you make during your first turn deals additional damage equal to your Rage damage.

Effect: Spirit Empathy.name: 效果：灵魂共情 Effect: Spirit Empathy
Effect: Spirit Empathy.description:
你拥有与周遭灵体沟通的非凡本领。在接下来的1小时内，当附近的灵体协助你完成目标时，你可以以+1状态加值使用@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.EwgTZBWsc8qKaViP]{Investigate}与@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{Search}活动。若在此期间你与灵体或作祟之物进入遭遇，你的先攻检定获得+2环境加值。若你拥有武器专精，该状态加值提高至+2；若你拥有高等武器专精，则提高至+3。

You have the uncanny knack for reaching out to the spirits around you. For the next hour, you can use the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.EwgTZBWsc8qKaViP]{Investigate} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{Search} activities with a +1 status bonus as spirits nearby aid you in your endeavor. If during this time you enter an encounter with a spirit or haunt, you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to your Initiative check. The status bonus increases to +2 if you have weapon specialization, or to +3 if you have greater weapon specialization.

Mad Science.name: 疯狂科学 Mad Science
Mad Science.description:
消耗 1 个多用小瓶

需求 你正穿戴一件装置，且其中至少存放了 1 个多用小瓶。

你的装置启动你突变剂的凝结，将其直接注入你的身体。你制造并立即消耗 1 个你配方簿中、等级不高于你自身等级的炼金突变剂，且无需花费通常的炼金原材料金钱成本，也无需尝试一次制造检定。该物品具有灌注（特征）。

Cost 1 versatile vial

Requirements You are wearing an apparatus with at least 1 versatile vial stored inside.

Your apparatus initiates the coagulation of your mutagens, injecting them directly into your body. You create and then immediately consume a single alchemical mutagen of your level or lower that’s in your formula book without having to spend the normal monetary cost in alchemical raw materials or needing to attempt a Crafting check. This item has the infused trait.

Effect: Runic Metal.name: 效果：符文金属 Effect: Runic Metal

Effect: Reckless Rage.name: 效果：鲁莽狂暴 Effect: Reckless Rage
Effect: Reckless Rage.description:
你以鲁莽的狂暴透支自己，使你从凡人变为怒火的化身。

你进入狂暴，并获得以下额外效果：

  • 你获得对你的野蛮人（职业）职业DC的+2状态加值。

  • 你的豁免检定和AC承受–1减值。

  • 你将来自狂暴抗力的抗力翻倍。

  • 你在结束狂暴后1小时内处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued}状态。

特殊 若你拥有血怒者或狂野之血本能，则你改为获得对你的法术攻击调整和法术DC的+2状态加值，而非对你的野蛮人（职业）职业DC的加值。

You overexert yourself with a reckless rage that changes you from person to avatar of fury.

You Rage with the following additional effects:

  • You gain a +2 status bonus to your barbarian class DC.

  • You take a –1 penalty to saving throws and AC.

  • You double your resistance from raging resistance.

  • You are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued} for 1 hour after you finish raging.

Special If you have the bloodrager or wildblood instincts, you gain a +2 status bonus to your spell attack modifier and spell DCs instead of to your barbarian class DC.

Raging Stride.name: 狂怒奔行 Raging Stride
Raging Stride.description:
需求 该生物是从不羁本能获得的动物伙伴。

你的动物伙伴释放其内心野兽并投入战斗。你的动物伙伴使用 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Ah5g9pDwWF9b9VW9]{狂暴}，然后立即向你或一名敌人疾行。

Requirements The creature is an animal companion gained from the untamed instinct.

Your animal companion unleashes its inner beast and moves into battle. Your animal companion uses @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Ah5g9pDwWF9b9VW9]{Rage} and then immediately Strides towards you or an enemy.

Whirling Advance.name: 旋风突进 Whirling Advance
Whirling Advance.description:
需求 你未处于负载状态，且未穿着重型护甲。

你以武器与凶猛交织成的旋风逼近你的敌人。选择你30英尺内的一名敌人，然后尝试一次对抗目标意志DC的 @Check[type:acrobatics|defense:will]{杂技} 检定。然后你进行跨步。

如果你的检定成功，则就夹击所选生物而言，你在移动期间所占据的任何方格都被视为已被占据，直到你下个回合开始。

Requirements You’re not encumbered or wearing heavy armor.

You approach your enemy as a whirl of weapons and ferocity. Choose an enemy within 30 feet of you and then attempt an @Check[type:acrobatics|defense:will]{Acrobatics} check against the target’s Will DC. You then Stride.

If your check was successful, you treat any squares you occupied during your movement as occupied until the beginning of your next turn for the purposes of flanking the chosen creature.

Effect: Victorious Runes.name: 效果：胜利符文 Effect: Victorious Runes
Effect: Victorious Runes.description:
当你对一个生物造成重击时，你获得等于你的等级加上你的力量调整值的临时生命值，持续1轮。

When you critically strike a creature, you gain temporary Hit Points equal to your level plus your Strength modifier for 1 round.

Effect: Welcome Misery.name: 效果：欢迎痛苦 Effect: Welcome Misery
Effect: Welcome Misery.description:
直到你下一回合开始前，你对抗听觉效果的状态加值翻倍，并且你无视因惊惧（状态）而对你的攻击掷骰造成的状态减值。

Until the beginning of your next turn, you double your status bonus against auditory effects and you ignore status penalties to your attack rolls from the frightened condition.

Effect: Legacy Unravels.name: 效果：遗产瓦解 Effect: Legacy Unravels
Effect: Legacy Unravels.description:
你唤起自身传承的力量，你的遗珍武器获得你选择的一个武器符文的增益：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Wm0X7Pfd1bfocPSv]{Corrosive}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.XszNvxnymWYRaoTp]{Flaming}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.M5M1WJ5KzbYfRGsY]{Frost}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.JQdwHECogcTzdd8R]{Ghost Touch}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.qlunQzfnzPQpMG6U]{Returning}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.NVst7e69agGG9Qwd]{Shock}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.dTxbaa7HSiJbIuNN]{Thundering}。该符文会持续到你不再狂暴或你不再持用你的遗珍武器为止。若你将要给予一把武器的属性符文数量超过其正常上限，则其中一个现有的属性符文（由你选择）会被压制，直到你解消该效果或该效果结束。

若你至少为15级，将keen加入你可选择的符文列表，并且也可以选择@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.vQUIUAFOTOWj3ohh]{corrosive}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.RSZwUlCzUX7Nb4UA]{flaming}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Sexud7FdxIrg50vU]{frost}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.TEa1oKZbwsOvC6TZ]{shock}以及@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Lb7F2BR9X9TF1vjX]{thundering}的强效类型。

You call upon the power of your legacy and your vestige weapon gains the benefits of a weapon rune you choose: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Wm0X7Pfd1bfocPSv]{Corrosive}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.XszNvxnymWYRaoTp]{Flaming}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.M5M1WJ5KzbYfRGsY]{Frost}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.JQdwHECogcTzdd8R]{Ghost Touch}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.qlunQzfnzPQpMG6U]{Returning}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.NVst7e69agGG9Qwd]{Shock}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.dTxbaa7HSiJbIuNN]{Thundering}. The rune lasts for as long as you are raging and you are wielding your vestige weapon. If you would give a weapon more property runes than its normal maximum, one of the existing property runes (you choose) is suppressed until you Dismiss the effect or the effect ends.

If you are at least 15th level, add keen to the list of runes you can choose as well as the greater types of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.vQUIUAFOTOWj3ohh]{corrosive}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.RSZwUlCzUX7Nb4UA]{flaming}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Sexud7FdxIrg50vU]{frost}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.TEa1oKZbwsOvC6TZ]{shock}, and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Lb7F2BR9X9TF1vjX]{thundering}.

Giddy Step.name: 欢快步伐 Giddy Step
Giddy Step.description:
触发 你在一次近战打击中成功。

需求 你未处于负荷状态且未穿着重型护甲。

你的打击让你感到热情的喜悦，令你想要移动。你踏步进入一个方格，使触发的目标仍在你的触及范围内。

特殊 如果你拥有@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.88Q33X2a0iYPkbzd]{Mighty Rage}职业特性，则你在第一个回合中进行的第一次打击造成等同于你的狂暴伤害的额外伤害。

Trigger You succeed at a melee Strike.

Requirements You are not encumbered or wearing heavy armor.

Your blows cause you to feel enthusiastic joy that makes you want to move. You Step into a square that keeps the triggering target within your reach.

Special If you have the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.88Q33X2a0iYPkbzd]{Mighty Rage} class feature, the first Strike you make during your first turn deals additional damage equal to your Rage damage.

Stalking Stroke.name: 潜行突刺 Stalking Stroke
Stalking Stroke.description:
你以无声的机敏接近敌人，以近乎不可能的隐蔽性靠近。你对一名你能看见的敌人进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{潜行}。若你在移动结束时具备进行一次打击的能力，且该打击对该敌人会造成你从狂暴获得的额外伤害，则你可以对该敌人进行一次打击。若你选择进行一次打击，且你的隐匿检定超过所选敌人的察觉DC，则在你的打击之后之前，你对该敌人处于隐藏状态。

You approach an enemy with silent tact, approaching with nigh impossible subtlety. You @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{Sneak} towards an enemy you can see. If you end your movement with the ability to make a Strike that would deal your additional damage from rage against that enemy, you can make a Strike against that enemy. If you choose to make a Strike and your Stealth check exceeds the Perception DC of the chosen enemy, you are hidden to that enemy until after your Strike.

Furious Stride.name: 狂怒奔袭 Furious Stride
Furious Stride.description:
你将身体逼至极限以获得速度提升。若你接下来使用的下一个动作或行动包含一次疾行，则该次疾行获得狂暴（特征），且你必须进行一次 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:@self.level|adjustment:5] 豁免，对抗等同于你等级的困难DC。

大成功或大失败 你的下一次疾行的速度增加10英尺。

成功 同大成功或大失败，但你的下一次疾行的速度增加5英尺。

失败 在你完成疾行后，你的速度在1轮内承受–5英尺的状态减值。

大成功或大失败 同失败，但该减值为–10英尺的状态减值。

You push your body to its limits for a boost in speed. If the next action or activity you use includes a Stride, that Stride gains the Rage trait and you must make a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:@self.level|adjustment:5] save against a hard DC of your level.

Critical Success You increase the Speed for your next Stride by 10 feet.

Success As critical success, but you increase the Speed for your next Stride by 5 feet.

Failure After you complete your Stride, you take a –5-foot status penalty to your Speed for 1 round.

Critical Failure As failure, but the penalty is a –10-foot status penalty.

Stand Firm.name: 屹立不倒 Stand Firm
Stand Firm.description:
你稳住脚步，变得极难被移动。如果这是一次遭遇的第一轮且你未超载、也未穿着重型护甲，你可以以自由动作（）使用“稳如磐石”。你将你的近战攻击的触及增加5尺，并在直到你下个回合开始前成为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{禁足（状态）}。在你处于禁足（状态）期间，针对试图移动你的效果，就禁足（状态）的DC而言，你使用你的强韧DC作为该DC。

特殊 若你拥有 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.88Q33X2a0iYPkbzd]{强力狂暴} 职业特性，则当你以自由动作（）使用“稳如磐石”时，你在第一个回合中进行的第一次打击会造成等同于你的狂暴伤害的额外伤害。

You set your feet, becoming extremely difficult to move. You can use Stand Firm as a free action if it is the first round of an encounter and you are not encumbered or wearing heavy armor. You increase the reach of your melee attacks by 5 feet and become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{immobilized} until the beginning of your next turn. For the purposes of effects that attempt to move you while you’re immobilized, you use your Fortitude DC for the DC of the immobilized condition.

Special If you have the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.88Q33X2a0iYPkbzd]{Mighty Rage} class feature, when you use Stand Firm as a free action, the first Strike you make during your first turn deals additional damage equal to your Rage damage.

Effect: Revitalizing Blood.name: 效果：复苏之血 Effect: Revitalizing Blood

Effect: Bolster Hope.name: 效果：鼓舞希望 Effect: Bolster Hope
Effect: Bolster Hope.description:
触发的敌人对触发的盟友进行打击时承受–2/–1环境减值。

The triggering enemy takes a –2/–1 circumstance penalty to its Strike against the triggering ally.

Effect: Invigorated.name: 效果：振奋 Effect: Invigorated
Effect: Invigorated.description:
给予你所选表达式的振奋效果。

你每轮不能获得振奋加值超过一次。若你拥有 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.qMtyQGUllPdgpzUo]{Revitalizing Rage} 职业特性，则临时生命值的数量等于你从狂暴中正常会获得的数量。

当你的临时生命值降至0时，删除此效果。

Grants the invigoration effect of your given expression.

You cannot gain an invigoration bonus more than once per round. If you have the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.qMtyQGUllPdgpzUo]{Revitalizing Rage} class feature, the number of temporary Hit Points is equal to the normal amount you would gain from Rage.

Delete this effect when your temporary Hit Points are reduced to 0.

Effect: Heedless Swig.name: 效果：鲁莽痛饮 Effect: Heedless Swig
Effect: Heedless Swig.description:
你获得+1对伤害的状态加值，持续时间为2轮外加等于该物品等级一半的轮数。如果你为7级，该对伤害的状态加值提升至+2；如果你为15级，则提升至+4。

Foundry Note 手动编辑持续时间，以包含来自物品等级一半的额外持续时间。

You gain a +1 status bonus to damage for 2 rounds plus a number of rounds equal to half the level of the item. The status bonus to damage increases to +2 if you are 7th level, or +4 if you are 15th level.

Foundry Note Manually edit the duration to include the additional duration from half the item level.
